metadata.application: SMA pathway validation — LIMK2/CFL2/ROCK2 knockout and CRISPRi

design_parameters.off_target_method: Sequence uniqueness + CFD scoring against hg38

oligo_suppliers.name: IDT (Integrated DNA Technologies)
oligo_suppliers.notes: Order 2 nmol scale, include Alt-R tracrRNA. For RNP delivery, also order Alt-R S.p. Cas9 Nuclease V3.

oligo_suppliers.name: Synthego
oligo_suppliers.notes: Recommended for iPSC-MN experiments — modified sgRNAs have higher stability.

oligo_suppliers.name: Addgene
oligo_suppliers.notes: Clone protospacer into BsmBI site. For CRISPRi, use pLV-hU6-sgRNA-hUbC-dCas9-KRAB (Addgene #71236).

ordering_info.cas9_protein: Alt-R S.p. Cas9 Nuclease V3 (IDT #1081058) or EnGen Spy Cas9 NLS (NEB #M0646)

step_1_T7_endonuclease.description: T7 Endonuclease I (T7EI) mismatch cleavage assay
step_1_T7_endonuclease.protocol: PCR amplify ~500bp around cut site, denature/reanneal, digest with T7EI (NEB #M0302), run on 2% agarose gel

step_2_sanger_sequencing.protocol: PCR amplify, Sanger sequence, analyze with Synthego ICE (https://ice.synthego.com) or TIDE

step_3_NGS_amplicon.protocol: Targeted amplicon-seq with Illumina MiSeq, analyze with CRISPResso2
step_3_NGS_amplicon.recommended_for: Final validation, off-target profiling at top predicted sites

step_4_protein_knockdown.description: Western blot confirmation of protein loss

antibodies.LIMK2: Cell Signaling #3845 (rabbit mAb) or Abcam ab97353
antibodies.p-Cofilin_Ser3: Cell Signaling #3313 — functional readout of LIMK2 KO

step_5_functional_readout.description: Neurite outgrowth / axon length in iPSC-MNs
step_5_functional_readout.protocol: Image at 48-72h post-electroporation, measure neurite length with ImageJ/NeuronJ
step_5_functional_readout.rationale: LIMK2 KO should increase neurite outgrowth via reduced cofilin phosphorylation

LIMK2.rationale: LIMK2 phosphorylates cofilin (CFL1/CFL2) at Ser3, inactivating actin severing. In SMA motor neurons, LIMK2 (not LIMK1) is the dominant kinase. LIMK2 inhibition restores actin dynamics and is predicted to rescue neurite outgrowth defects.
sma_evidence: LIMK2 is the dominant LIM kinase in SMA MNs (GSE208629 single-cell data)
p-Cofilin elevated in SMA MNs — indicates LIMK hyperactivity
ROCK-LIMK2-CFL2 axis identified as therapeutic target
Fasudil (upstream ROCK inhibitor) rescues SMA phenotype in vivo

knockout_guides.off_target_assessment: No perfect matches in hg38. 1 site with 3 mismatches (chr7 intergenic). Low off-target risk.
knockout_guides.notes: Targets kinase subdomain VIb (catalytic loop). Frameshift here ablates kinase activity.

knockout_guides.off_target_assessment: No perfect matches. 2 sites with 3+ mismatches. Acceptable specificity.
knockout_guides.notes: Targets the activation segment containing Thr505 phosphorylation site.

knockout_guides.off_target_assessment: Clean — no matches with fewer than 4 mismatches in coding regions.
knockout_guides.notes: Targets substrate-binding region. Recommended as primary guide — highest predicted on-target activity.

knockout_guides.off_target_assessment: 1 match with 2 mismatches in LIMK1 exon 4 (chr7). Use with caution — verify specificity by Sanger.
knockout_guides.notes: Early exon target — ensures complete protein disruption. Risk of LIMK1 cross-targeting; include LIMK1 off-target check.

knockout_guides.off_target_assessment: No perfect matches. 1 site with 2 mismatches in non-coding region (chr3). Acceptable.
knockout_guides.notes: PDZ domain disruption prevents membrane localization.

crispri_guides.off_target_assessment: GC-rich region — 2 off-target sites with 3 mismatches in promoters. Acceptable for CRISPRi.
crispri_guides.notes: Targets immediately upstream of ATG. Optimal CRISPRi window (-50 to +300 from TSS). Use with dCas9-KRAB.

crispri_guides.off_target_assessment: 1 off-target with 3 mismatches (intronic, chr15). Low risk.
crispri_guides.notes: Targets non-template strand downstream of TSS — blocks RNA Pol II elongation.

crispri_guides.off_target_assessment: Clean profile. No matches with fewer than 4 mismatches.
crispri_guides.notes: Downstream of TSS. dCas9-KRAB at this position blocks transcription elongation.

crispri_guides.off_target_assessment: 2 sites with 3 mismatches in non-coding regions. Acceptable for CRISPRi.
crispri_guides.notes: Upstream promoter targeting. May partially repress — combine with CRISPRi-1 for stronger knockdown.

crispri_guides.off_target_assessment: No concerning off-targets. 1 site with 4 mismatches.
crispri_guides.notes: Furthest from TSS — expected weaker repression. Backup or titration guide.

CFL2.rationale: CFL2 is upregulated in SMA motor neurons (+1.83x, GSE208629). It is the substrate of LIMK2, and its phosphorylation state (p-CFL2) is a direct biomarker of LIMK2 activity. CFL2 KO validates whether cofilin dysregulation is causal in SMA neurite defects.
sma_evidence: CFL2 UP in SMA MNs (+1.83x, GSE208629)
CFL2 DOWN in ALS MNs (opposite direction = SMA-specific)
CFL2 KO should phenocopy LIMK2 pathway disruption

knockout_guides.off_target_assessment: 1 site with 2 mismatches in CFL1 (chr11). CRITICAL: verify CFL1 is not cut. Design CFL1-specific primers for off-target Sanger.
knockout_guides.notes: Targets near Ser3 phosphorylation site (the LIMK2 substrate residue). Highest biological relevance. CHECK CFL1 cross-reactivity.

knockout_guides.off_target_assessment: No matches with fewer than 3 mismatches. Clean specificity for CFL2.
knockout_guides.notes: Early exon targeting. Less risk of CFL1 cross-reactivity. Recommended as primary guide.
Disrupts G-actin binding interface. Functional null expected from any frameshift.

ROCK2.full_name: Rho Associated Coiled-Coil Containing Protein Kinase 2
ROCK2.rationale: ROCK2 is upstream of LIMK2 in the RhoA-ROCK-LIMK-Cofilin signaling cascade. ROCK2 is the brain-enriched isoform and is the target of Fasudil. ROCK2 KO validates whether pathway inhibition at this node phenocopies LIMK2 KO.
sma_evidence: ROCK1 UP in ALS MNs (GSE287257 single-cell)
Fasudil (pan-ROCK inhibitor) rescues SMA phenotype in mouse models
ROCK-LIMK-Cofilin is the convergence pathway across SMA and ALS
ROCK2 is the brain-enriched isoform (more relevant for MN biology)

knockout_guides.off_target_assessment: No matches with fewer than 4 mismatches in coding regions. Low risk.
knockout_guides.notes: Targets kinase ATP-binding pocket. Frameshift ablates all kinase activity. Recommended as primary guide.

knockout_guides.off_target_assessment: 1 site with 2 mismatches in ROCK1 (chr18). Cross-reactivity possible — verify with ROCK1-specific primers.
knockout_guides.notes: Catalytic loop targeting. Risk of ROCK1 cross-targeting — include ROCK1 off-target validation.

knockout_guides.off_target_assessment: Clean. Unique sequence in hg38, no significant off-targets.
knockout_guides.notes: Early exon ensures complete protein null. No ROCK1 homology at this region.

experimental_recommendations.cell_model: Human iPSC-derived motor neurons (iPSC-MNs) from SMA Type I patients (SMN1 deleted, SMN2 2 copies)
experimental_recommendations.isogenic_controls: Use CRISPR-corrected isogenic iPSC lines or healthy donor iPSC-MNs

delivery_method.reason: Transient delivery minimizes off-target effects, no DNA integration, works well in iPSC-MNs
delivery_method.protocol: Lonza 4D-Nucleofector, P3 Primary Cell Kit, program CA-137
delivery_method.cas9_amount: 60 pmol Cas9 + 150 pmol sgRNA per 200,000 cells

controls.negative: Non-targeting sgRNA (IDT Alt-R Negative Control crRNA #1072544)
controls.positive: sgRNA targeting known essential gene (e.g., PLK1) for transfection efficiency

experimental_recommendations.multiplexing_note: For pathway epistasis, co-deliver LIMK2-KO-3 + ROCK2-KO-1 to test whether ROCK2 KO and LIMK2 KO are epistatic (non-additive = same pathway).

timeline.day_0: Electroporate RNP into iPSC-MNs (day 20-25 of differentiation)
timeline.day_2: Harvest DNA for T7EI assay, image for acute toxicity
timeline.day_5_7: Western blot for protein knockdown (LIMK2, p-Cofilin, CFL2, ROCK2)
timeline.day_14_plus: NGS amplicon-seq for precise indel quantification and off-target profiling
